{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Senator Gorgol
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]]
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Senator Gorgol]] is associated with the planet [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28">''The Knight'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Senator Gorgol]] is a senator being challenged by [[Varic]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30">''The Knight'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Raion Raithe, in the name of Senator Gorgol and the planet Visiria, I accept your challenge.”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“I challenge Senators Gorgol and Cyclon at once,” Varic said.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
